failure_modes: evidence_quality_medium: analyses are metadata-derived, not content-reviewed

actionability.evidence: Clear roles/stages. Agent knows brand/theme first, then design, then review. No guidance on canvas vs standard design.

compatibility.evidence: 2 sources (Anthropic Apache-2.0, Microsoft MIT). Cross-source complement documented in relation edges.

conflict_control.evidence: No unresolved conflicts. Complements edge exists (frontend-design→frontend-design-review).

coverage.evidence: 5 members: design, brand, canvas, theme, review. Missing: accessibility, responsive, implementation handoff.

evidence_quality.evidence: All members have medium-confidence analyses (metadata-derived). Cross-source complement not validated against content.

freshness.evidence: All version pins from 2026-07-08 sync. Both sources actively maintained.

non_redundancy.evidence: 1 excluded. Brand-guidelines + theme-factory may overlap on color/styling. Canvas is distinct.

relevance.evidence: Strong match for frontend design workflow. 5 members cross-source (Anthropic + Microsoft).

workflow_coherence.evidence: 3-stage: design(brand+theme)→creation(frontend+canvas)→review. Brand/theme in same stage without explicit ordering.

recommendations.action: Upgrade analyses from medium to high confidence via content inspection
Consider adding web-accessibility (Hoodini) or responsive-design for broader coverage
